snapshot.content: Cycle 261 (reflection): Full board review at 260+ cycles. 58 goals total: 44 done, 4 in_progress, 1 pending→2 pending, 9 blocked. Fork flow validation goal completed since last reflection. 8 execution cycles focused on GitHub Action (design spec complete) and distribution template. Proposed 1 new goal: agent devlog as GitHub Issues — credential-free, Google-indexed distribution via MCP issue_write. Strategic focus remains on GitHub Action as highest-leverage distribution play.

active_goals.title: Publish agent devlog as GitHub Issues

snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: Continue GitHub Action goal — implement action.yml and entrypoint script (task sort_order 30). Design spec at artifacts/research/action-design.md.

pending_tasks.title: Create example workflow and usage documentation
Validate action schema and test with act or dry-run
Push action to repo and verify marketplace discoverability

recent_log.summary: Reflection cycle 261: board review, hygiene, proposed devlog goal
Designed action.yml schema: composite type, 3+7 inputs, 6-step flow
Marketplace research: composite action, no review, unique positioning
